introduction.zh: 在特殊魔力的影响下，会改变自身的身体构造。“这是关于勇气的故事，他很脆弱却也不曾退缩,这是关于梦想的故事，梦很简单却也执着。这就是我，迪莫”。
introduction.en:
Under the influence of special magic, its own physical structure can change. 
This is a story about courage — though fragile, it never retreats. 
This is a story about dreams — simple in nature, yet held with unwavering resolve. 
This is who I am: Dimor.

introduction.zh: 长大可以喷出火焰，现在已经可以熟练使用火花
introduction.en: When fully grown, it can spew flames; now it can already skillfully wield sparks.

distribution.zh: 维苏威火山口打野怪几率刷新、弹弹机
distribution.en: Mount Vesuvius Crater Monster Spawn Rate Refresh, Bouncy Machine

introduction.zh: 长出蓝色的小翅膀 双拳拥有强力的火焰
introduction.en: Blue wings sprout from his back Fists blaze with powerful flames

introduction.zh: 炙热的火焰包围全身熊熊燃烧，能够喷射大量火焰燃烧一切
introduction.en: Blazing flames engulf the entire body, raging fiercely, capable of spewing vast quantities of fire to consume everything in its path.

introduction.zh: 随时带着刚刚长大的孩子，擅长吸收水分，形成强大的冲击力
introduction.en: It guards its newly grown young while using absorbed water to unleash powerful impacts.

introduction.zh: 头上的触角可以感受，水中细微的变化，体型变大了长满了小触角
introduction.en: Its head antennae detect faint water movements. Having grown in size, its body is now covered with small tentacles.

introduction.zh: 喜欢漂浮在水中，没事吐个泡泡，头顶有个漂亮的蝴蝶结
introduction.en: It likes to float in the water, idly blowing bubbles, with a pretty bow tied on its head.

distribution.zh: 杰诺斯浅海、弹弹机几率获得
distribution.en: Can be obtained from the Bounce Machine in Genos Shallows with a certain probability.

introduction.zh: 长了三条锋利的尾巴,胖胖的身体，经常会有身体冲撞碾压对手
introduction.en: It grows three sharp tails. With its chubby body, it often charges and crushes its opponents.

introduction.zh: 长出两条锋利的尾巴 经常吐出舌头挑衅对方瘦弱的身体撞击强而有力
introduction.en: This pet grows two sharp tails and often sticks out its tongue to provoke its foes. Despite its skinny build, its tackles are surprisingly powerful.

introduction.zh: 不停摇晃的尾巴容易受到惊吓平时很乖巧
introduction.en: With a constantly wagging tail, it is easily startled but usually well-behaved.
